name: Clippy PFP Cult
description: Clippy is a community-driven digital project centered on culture, identity, and participation rather than purely speculative use. Inspired by a well-known early internet character associated with guidance and interaction, Clippy has evolved into a shared cultural symbol shaped by its community. The project exists as a collective effort where members contribute through engagement, creative expression, and participation in ecosystem activities. Clippy functions as a coordination and engagement layer for community initiatives, including digital collectibles (NFTs), merchandise, interactive experiences such as mini-games, and future software tools inspired by the Clippy concept. These elements are designed to encourage participation and continuity rather than passive ownership. The project emphasizes transparency, accessibility, and long-term cultural relevance through active community involvemen
